chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1673 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 5839/22 For hearing of MA 5840/22 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Dilawar Qureshi, Advocate for Petitioner M/S. Khurram Shahzad, Additional Director General (Law) Election Commission of Pakistan; Zaheer Abbas Khowaja, Law Officer Election Commission of Pakistan along with Roshan Ali Mastoi, Election Commissioner Mirpurkhas, Ali Abdullah Khalid, Regional Election Commissioner, Hyderabad Division, Hyderabad, Saleemuddin District Election Commissioner Tharparkar, Ahmed Ali Abbasi, District Election Commissioner, Umerkot. Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, Deputy Attorney General M/s. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Asstt: A.G. and Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Asstt: A.G. Although initially Mr. Khurram Shahzad, Additional Director General, Election Commission of Pakistan has objected that the petitioner / objector was not the voter of Municipal Corporation; however, he then realized that he still is a voter of Ward which constituency was affected by virtue of delimitation hence the assigned reasons are not appropriate when the objections were rejected on the sole ground that he was not the voter. By consent, the impugned Order is set-aside and the matter is remanded to the delimitation authority for considering the objections of the objector / petitioner in the light of para-21(ii), (iv) & (vi). The petition to the above extent is allowed. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
